files.contentEquals: export const parseBoolean = (value: string) => { const normalized=value.toLowerCase(); if (normalized==='true') return true; if (normalized==='false') return false; throw new Error('invalid boolean'); };

checks.label: behavior-contract
argv: import { parseBoolean } from './src/value.ts'; let threw=false; try { parseBoolean('yes'); } catch { threw=true; } if (!threw || !parseBoolean('TRUE') || parseBoolean('FALSE')) process.exit(1);
